name: SCC_VS_Nw_Info_Cnf
title: SCC_VS_Nw_Info_Cnf
syntax: void SCC_VS_Nw_Info_Cnf ( byte SourceMacAddress[], long NumAvLn, byte NID[] )
description: The callback is called as soon as a VS_Nw_Info.Cnf message is received. This is a response of the QCA9000 chip when using link status polling. (Additional data cannot be queried at the moment.)
